# Unified Delivery Traceability Matrix

**Document ID**: TRACEABILITY-MATRIX
**Version**: 5.0
**Date**: 2026-03-11
**Generated By**: Claude (Release Engineer)
**Covers**: All FRs (FR-001 through FR-125), NFRs (QW-1 through QW-5, ME-1 through ME-9, LE-1 through LE-3, D-5 through D-7, NFR-017-01 through NFR-017-06, NFR-018-01 through NFR-018-06, NFR-019-01 through NFR-019-04), DIST (FR-DIST-01 through FR-DIST-09)

---

## Legend

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| ✅ | Fully covered — source files and tests exist |
| ⚠️ | Partially covered — source exists but tests are missing or indirect |
| ❌ | Missing — no source or test coverage found |

---

| Req ID | Title | Design Ref | Source Files | Tests | Status |

| QW-1 | SECRET_KEY + Keyring for API Keys | SRS-SAD-TASK-011 | `config/settings.py`, `app.py` | `tests/test_settings.py`, `tests/test_quick_wins.py`, `tests/test_coverage_boost.py` | ✅ |
| QW-2 | Fix 16 Swallowed Exceptions | SRS-SAD-TASK-011 | `bot/bot.py`, `bot/browser.py`, `app.py`, `core/ai_engine.py`, `bot/search/linkedin.py`, `bot/search/indeed.py`, `bot/apply/workday.py`, `bot/apply/ashby.py` | `tests/test_quick_wins.py` (grep-based detection) | ✅ |
| QW-3 | Logging Configuration | SRS-SAD-TASK-011 | `run.py` | `tests/test_run.py`, `tests/test_quick_wins.py` | ✅ |
| QW-4 | Race Condition on `_bot_thread` | SRS-SAD-TASK-011 | `app.py`, `app_state.py` | `tests/test_api.py`, `tests/test_quick_wins.py` | ✅ |
| QW-5 | Temp File Leak in CSV Export | SRS-SAD-TASK-011 | `routes/applications.py` | `tests/test_api.py`, `tests/test_quick_wins.py` | ✅ |

| ME-8 | Graceful Shutdown + Signal Handling | PRODUCTION-READINESS | `app.py`, `run.py`, `routes/lifecycle.py`, `db/database.py` | `tests/test_api.py` (shutdown endpoint) | ✅ |
| ME-9 | Security Hardening (Session A) | PRODUCTION-READINESS | `app.py`, `routes/applications.py`, `routes/login.py` | `tests/test_quick_wins.py` (TestSecurityHeaders, TestPathTraversalProtection, TestLoginURLValidation), `tests/test_rate_limiter.py` | ✅ |

## Summary Statistics

| Category | Total | ✅ Covered | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ Missing |
|----------|-------|-----------|------------|-----------|
| Functional Requirements (FR-001 to FR-082) | 79 | 66 | 13 | 0 |
| Quick Wins (QW-1 to QW-5) | 5 | 5 | 0 | 0 |
| Medium Effort (ME-1 to ME-9) | 9 | 9 | 0 | 0 |
| Deferred (D-5 to D-7) | 3 | 3 | 0 | 0 |
| Large Effort (LE-1 to LE-3) | 3 | 3 | 0 | 0 |
| Distribution (FR-DIST-01 to FR-DIST-09) | 9 | 9 | 0 | 0 |
| Analytics Dashboard (FR-090 to FR-101) | 12 | 11 | 1 | 0 |
| Analytics NFRs (NFR-017-01 to NFR-017-06) | 6 | 4 | 2 | 0 |
| **Total** | **126** | **110** | **16** | **0** |

**Previous**: 108 requirements, 95 ✅, 13 ⚠️, 0 ❌
**Current**: 126 requirements, 110 ✅, 16 ⚠️, 0 ❌
**Improvement**: +18 requirements from Analytics Dashboard (TASK-017). 3 ⚠️ are frontend-only (period selector UI, a11y, chart perf) — require browser testing.

---

## Notes on Remaining ⚠️ Items (13)

All 13 partial items fall into **two categories that cannot be automated with pytest**:

### Category 1: Electron/Desktop Features (7 items)
FR-019 (App Launch), FR-020 (Backend Lifecycle), FR-021 (Health Check via Electron), FR-022 (Splash Screen), FR-023 (Graceful Shutdown via Electron), FR-024 (System Tray), FR-030 (Log Capture), FR-081 (Electron-Only Distribution)

**Reason**: These run in the Electron main process (Node.js). The Python test suite cannot test Node.js code. Requires Spectron or Playwright for Electron E2E tests.

### Category 2: Frontend UI Rendering (4 items)
FR-012 (SocketIO real-time), FR-014 (Dashboard rendering), FR-017 (Settings rendering), FR-039 (Warning banner rendering), FR-064 (Schedule UI), FR-077 (LLM config UI)

**Reason**: Backend API endpoints are fully tested. The frontend JavaScript modules render HTML dynamically — testing requires Playwright browser automation against the running app. The API contracts are verified; only the DOM rendering logic is untested.

### Category 3: Historical / Deprecated (2 items)
FR-027 (No-Browser Flag — removed when app became Electron-only per FR-081), FR-029 (Shared Chromium — abandoned per ADR-006 revision).

**Reason**: Functionality no longer exists but requirements remain for historical traceability.

---
